programme.desc: With XiangPing assisting Kun YiLing and KangLan, XiaoQi is captured. KunPa ShanMing agrees to purchase the foreign guns in order to protect TongAi City from invasion.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Why Her? - EP 5
programme.desc: Oh Soo-jae is a talented lawyer who gets caught up in an unexpected case. At law school, she meets the student Gong Chan, who falls in love with her and would do anything to protect her.

programme.title: Singer 2025 - EP 7
programme.desc: The lineup of Singer 2025 once again features renowned artists from the Greater China region and beyond. The featuring singers include: Mickey Guyton, Beni, Shan Yi Chun, Terry Lin, Zhou Yan, Janice Vidal, Joyce Cheng, Christine Fan, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Train Driver's Diary
programme.desc: As Ilija nears retirement, his record of unintentional deaths as a train driver weighs heavy. His adopted son, Sima, fears following in his footsteps. But as days pass without incident, Ilija's determination to ensure Sima's success takes a dark turn.

programme.title: A Dose Of Happiness
programme.desc: Vesala’s search for happiness led her into an early marriage and a 3-year-old daughter. After her marriage fails, she and her daughter are brought down a path that leads to hell and back, one which brings her through drugs, fall, fear and redemption.

programme.title: A Thousand Times Good Night
programme.desc: Rebecca is one of the world's top war photographers. She must weather a major emotional storm when her husband and young daughters refuse to put up with her dangerous life any longer. They need Rebecca, who, however, loves both her family and her work.

programme.title: The Black Minutes
programme.desc: Vicente Rangel, a musician turned detective, embarks on a police case to catch a murderer of girls in a corrupt oil town on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Martinez
programme.desc: Martinez, an embittered Chilean in his sixties who has lived in Mexico for the past 40 years, is being forced to retire from his job. As he struggles with life changes, things change as a neighbour suddenly dies.

programme.title: Tokyo Fianc
programme.desc: A charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery. Amélie, a Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with Rinri, a Francophile Japanese student.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Victoria Must Go
programme.desc: Hedvig and Henrik's new stepmother Victoria is annoying and constantly introducing new rules. They decide to hire a hitman to get rid of her, and end up persuading a very reluctant immigrant, Carl, to do the job.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Seeds Of Violence
programme.desc: At the Hamburg DOM festival, Helen Dorn and forensic scientist Weyer witness a paramedic's brutal assault. When a high-society boy is later found dead, unravelling a dark secret linking the two cases.

programme.title: A Tale of Samurai Cooking - A True Love Story
programme.desc: Great cook Haru has married into the legendary “Kitchen Samurai” family. But her husband who is the successor of the Funaki family cannot cook at all. Haru makes a vow to make him a superb samurai chef and starts teaching her new husband how to cook.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Haunted by a colleague's suicide and grappling with guilt, Helen Dorn confronts the unspoken accusations of her fellow officers. At the same time, she is assigned to solve a medical student's murder, where she soon uncovers their double life.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort

programme.title: Djam
programme.desc: Djam, a bold young Greek woman, travels to Istanbul to look for an engine part for her uncle’s boat. She meets a stranded and penniless Avril, who is a volunteer for Syrian refugees. Together, they embark on a lively, music-filled journey to Mytilene.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghosts Of The Past
programme.desc: Ex-gang leader Degen escapes prison after 19 years, putting inspector Sarah Kohr and prosecutor Anton Mehringer in danger. Unable to count on the authorities without risking their secrets, they must confront their pasts when Degen kidnaps Anton's son.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Haunted by a colleague's suicide and grappling with guilt, Helen Dorn confronts the unspoken accusations of her fellow officers. At the same time, she is assigned to solve a medical student's murder, where she soon uncovers their double life.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: When photographer Marlene's son Jason faces a life-altering skateboarding accident, their journey to healing takes unexpected turns. As they travel from Berlin to Switzerland, Jason slowly convinces his mother that life takes detours.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Red Cloth
programme.desc: A fatal arson incident draws Helen Dorn into a far-left extremist community, who has targeted wealthy real estate agent Ralph Wagner. While they deny any involvement in the crime, it is indeed suspicious that they were previously almost ousted by Wagner.

programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 16
programme.desc: Step into Warna Ramadan’s kitchen for laughs and heartwarming moments with Sio Lubis and her mum in HIDANG. In GAYA, pick up easy tips on pairing the right colours to glam up your Raya look. And in SEMBANG, we take a heartfelt turn by exploring compassion, grief, and how to better support those going through loss.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 12
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 13
programme.desc: Fatimah’s financial schemes unravel as angry villagers threaten legal action. Tuan Ishak grows suspicious that Azizi has resumed seeing Qaisara.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 3
programme.desc: Amar is touched by Ardini's kindness in caring for him while he is unwell. Meanwhile, Luqman feels heartbroken as he watches them grow closer.

programme.title: Gerimis Di Hati Sr 1 - EP 6
programme.desc: As the sole breadwinner with a monthly income of less than 1500, Nizam struggles to care for his wife, Alifah, and two children. Alifah wishes to have her father and handicapped brother stay with her, and Nizam feels immense pressure to earn more money so that the family can upgrade to a bigger apartment. But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.title: Kemelut - EP 11
programme.desc: Kemelut (Life Crisis) Kemelut is a drama series that focuses on the different life crises of an affluent Malay family of four. To the public, Rusdis family is seen as the ideal family With everyone living their own lives, they are trying to keep each other out from their affairs, brewing lies ....

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 16
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Masih Ada Yang Peduli - EP 2
programme.desc: Dr Suvdaa provides healthcare for the nomads of northern Mongolia, which has less than three doctors per 1,000 inhabitants. To reach a patient, she often travels up to 200km on treacherous terrains.

programme.title: Riuh-Riuh Ramadan S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Tensions explode when Junipah discovers Hashim’s lies, sparking a household cold war that drags in both families. Kassim and Rogayah try to play peacemaker, but misunderstandings multiply, fuelled further by Muna’s secret sabotage and Mahmud’s mysterious errand. Chaos and wild accusations leave everyone hurt and confused. Kassim and Rogayah make a shocking decision.

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 34
programme.desc: Puan Ida pleads with Zara to stay for Alisya’s sake, especially after learning that Riqmal plans to take Alisya away and leave the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 17
programme.desc: Episode 17 of Warna Ramadan highlights strength and community. In SEMBANG, we explore women empowerment and how support from fellow women can transform a life. HIDANG features Azfar Maswan sharing a trending pastry snack, while GAYA offers ideas to elevate your foyer and front entrance décor for Raya. In CABAR, Zaki and Yusoff complete their volunteering mission with youth, marking a meaningful close to their challenge.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 13
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 14
programme.desc: Azizi persuades Qaisara to return and live with him, upsetting Tuan Ishak. Meanwhile, Fatimah’s husband, Maman, is released from prison and demands to know Qaisara’s whereabouts, only to be told she was sent away to protect her.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: X, Y & Zeek! - EP 10
programme.desc: After being called smelly, Zeek secretly uses his brother’s deodorant and triggers a painful cyst. Inside, Putri the Sweat Gland reveals that puberty has begun. With Mama’s help, Zeek learns that hygiene and self-care are part of growing up.

programme.title: Kelab JMJ S5 - EP 13
programme.desc: Discover the joy of language learning and problem-solving through musical performances, hands-on activities and interactive segments with the energetic casts of Kelab JMJ!

programme.title: Mendarat Di Syurga
programme.desc: Khalif and Dyan are two people who don't know each other, boarding Eriqa Airways flight JK566 scheduled to fly to Genovia. However, everything changed when the plane was destined to crash. Since then, the lives of their family members and friends changed dramatically.

programme.title: Berita

But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.
